ddls:
CREATE TABLE "work_slots" (
  "slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work slot */,
  "u_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the slot */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the work slot */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the work slot */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the work slot */,
  "slot_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the slot type */,
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location type */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the slot */,
  "slot_status" TEXT /* Status of the slot (e.g., available, allocated, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_slots_location_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_slots_u_id FOREIGN KEY ("u_id") REFERENCES users ("u_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_slots_slot_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("slot_type_id") REFERENCES slot_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "u_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "u_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, administrator) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("u_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slot_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each slot type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the slot type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the slot type */,
  "work_type" TEXT /* Type of work associated with this slot type */,
  "type_status" TEXT /* Status of the slot type (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slot_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "slot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work slot being allocated */,
  "u_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being allocated to the slot */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the slot was allocated */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of the allocation (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "allocated_user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user allocated to the slot */,
  "allocation_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the allocation */,
  "allocation_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slot_allocations_u_id FOREIGN KEY ("u_id") REFERENCES users ("u_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slot_allocations_slot_id FOREIGN KEY ("slot_id") REFERENCES work_slots ("slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slot_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "slot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work slot being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date being tracked */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the slot is available on the given date */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status of the slot's availability (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slot_availability_slot_id FOREIGN KEY ("slot_id") REFERENCES work_slots ("slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the location type */,
  "restrictions" TEXT /* Restrictions associated with the location type */,
  "location_type_status" TEXT /* Status of the location type (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slot_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "slot_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the slot type this template is for */,
  "template_status" TEXT /* Status of the template (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slot_templates_slot_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("slot_type_id") REFERENCES slot_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_slot_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "u_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has this preference */,
  "slot_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the slot type this preference is for */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location this preference is for */,
  "preference_value" INTEGER /* Whether the user prefers this slot type and location */,
  "preferred_schedule" TEXT /* Preferred schedule of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_slot_preferences_u_id FOREIGN KEY ("u_id") REFERENCES users ("u_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_slot_preferences_slot_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("slot_type_id") REFERENCES slot_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date being tracked */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the location is available on the given date */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status of the location's availability (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id")
)
